# docs(agentos): author the v13.1 self-healing / immune-system guide

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** the v13.1 headline — diagnostics + self-healing daemons (ADRs 0025/0026/0027) — has no reader-facing guide. It's the "runs unattended" payoff and is invisible.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] New guide: detect → diagnose → autonomous HEAL (never page) at reader altitude; corruption classes + terminals (re-embed / quarantine / freeze / accepted-loss); the cloud orchestrator's container-restart actuator = why a deployment runs unattended.
- [ ] Why-care framing (the #1 cloud-operator fear, solved); links ADRs 25/26/27 as deep substrate.
- [ ] Registered in `tree.json` + cross-linked from `ArchitectureOverview` and the cloud path.

**Files:** new `learn/agentos/SelfHealing.md` (name TBD) + `learn/tree.json`.
